was_expected_b_voice_anchor_passed_to_mi.evidence: MiniMax payload used voice_setting.voice_id = female-tianmei; historical B anchor qwen-t...ac19 is Qwen custom voice reference and is explicitly not a MiniMax voice_id.

chunking_voice_risk.chunk_pause_strategy: 0.12s silence inserted between chunks; estimated per-line pauses only drive subtitle/timeline allocation
chunking_voice_risk.whether_each_chunk_repeats_voice_prompt: voice_setting repeated, but no explicit style_prompt exists
chunking_voice_risk.reason: Separate remote calls with the same system voice can preserve basic timbre but may reset micro-prosody; no persistent style prompt or B-reference similarity gate constrains the long-form feel.

likely_root_cause.primary: The rerun used MiniMax system voice female-tianmei, not the historical B custom voice qwen-t...ac19 and not a user-approved MiniMax B voice_id.
secondary: b_voice_feel_reflected=true was a structural tag/report check, not an audio identity or similarity check.
No style_prompt/instructions encoded the B reference beyond report tags.
Fourteen chunked calls may flatten or reset the intended B pause/joke feel.
Speed 1.16 and emotion calm may push the delivery away from the slower B stop-and-joke cadence.

recommended_next_fix.next_codex_prompt_needed: Regenerate narration only after locking a MiniMax voice_id or approved MiniMax voice candidate against the B reference sample; do not mark voice_validation passed without human listening review.
